name: secure-browser
postStartCommand: docker compose -f .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml up -d && (for i in $(seq 1 40); do gh codespace ports visibility 3000:public -c "$CODESPACE_NAME" && echo 'port 3000 is public' && break || sleep 3; done) || echo 'could not auto-set public; set it manually in the Ports tab once'
